name: Tourism Holdings Rentals Limited
analysis: THL's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 5% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$2.2700, stop A$2.0097, target A$3.0509 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
